channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Road Map to the Next Middle East War
item.description: As crises in Lebanon mount, Iran is likely to trigger a response that increases the risk of renewed conflict.

item.title: White House requests $88 billion in emergency funds for Iran war and other needs
item.description: The White House is asking Congress for $87.6 billion in emergency appropriations for the Iran war and other critical needs, including economic assistance.

item.title: IRS performed better than expected in tax season despite staff cuts, except on phone, watchdog says
item.description: The IRS exceeded expectations in processing refunds during the 2026 tax season despite major workforce reductions, but the national telephone service lagged.

item.title: China's War Against Faith
item.description: The free world's response has been embarrassingly weak.
